name: mem0
description: External memory extension that recalls and persists memory through an external Mem0-compatible HTTP service.

fields.label: Mem0 Server URL
fields.description: Base URL of the external memory service.

fields.label: Request Timeout Seconds
fields.description: HTTP timeout used for Mem0 recall requests and persist-submit requests.

hooks.name: Recall Stored Memory
hooks.description: Fetches relevant memory from the external Mem0 service before the task starts.

hooks.name: Persist New Memory
hooks.description: Writes useful task outcomes back to the external Mem0 service after completion.
